description: Initial baseline for parseXML({ textMode: "delta" }) on cached City of Chicago XML export.

asi.hypothesis: Establish noise floor on the real XML workload before changing scanner or stream plumbing.

description: Tried replacing delta resume state with a simpler current-state inputExhausted() check in fromStringGenerator().

asi.hypothesis: Removing the per-advance resume object should cut overhead in delta mode.
asi.rollback_reason: Incorrect semantics: delta text events stopped splitting across stream boundaries, breaking XML scanner/parser/extractor tests.
asi.next_action_hint: Keep the cheaper closure-based signaling idea, but preserve knowledge of whether the generator resumed after exhaustion rather than checking current availability.

description: Reduced XML scanner string-concatenation overhead and removed the public parseXML()/extractXML() wrapper TransformStream pump.

asi.hypothesis: Avoid per-character resume object allocation, build names/text/quoted strings from substrings, and eliminate extra Web Streams wrapper overhead around the public XML APIs.
asi.confidence_note: Improvement is much larger than the initial three-run noise band and preserved event counts/errors.
